flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Trinity Baptist College rose 26% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.2k → $24.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trinity Baptist College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $15.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trinity Baptist College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $15.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Trinity Baptist College rose 168% between 2021 and 2024 (9.1% → 24.4%).
